    DEFAULT_EDITOR_CONFIG
    "{ entities: false, basicEntities: true, autoUpdateElement: false, contentsCss: [\'ckeditor/hippocontents.css\'], plugins: \'basicstyles,button,clipboard,enterkey,entities,floatingspace,floatpanel,htmlwriter,list,listblock,menu,menubutton,panel,panelbutton,removeformat,richcombo,stylescombo,tab,toolbar,undo\', removePlugins: \'divarea,liststyle,tabletools,tableresize\', extraPlugins: \'wysiwygarea\', disableNativeSpellChecker: false, title: false, toolbar: [ { name: \'basicstyles\', items: [ \'Bold\', \'Italic\' ] }, { name: \'clipboard\', items: [ \'Undo\', \'Redo\' ] }, { name: \'paragraph\', items: [ \'NumberedList\', \'BulletedList\' ] } ]}"
